sql.outbox_listPending:
SELECT t.id,t.status,t.next_retry_time,t.exchange_name
FROM (
  (SELECT id,status,next_retry_time,exchange_name
   FROM message_outbox
   WHERE status='NEW'
     AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= NOW())
     AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange')
   ORDER BY id ASC
   LIMIT 200)
  UNION ALL
  (SELECT id,status,next_retry_time,exchange_name
   FROM message_outbox
   WHERE status='FAIL'
     AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= NOW())
     AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange')
   ORDER BY id ASC
   LIMIT 200)
) t
ORDER BY t.id ASC
LIMIT 200
sql.outbox_countFail: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_outbox WHERE status='FAIL' AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange')
sql.outbox_sumRetryFail: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(retry_count),0) FROM message_outbox WHERE status='FAIL' AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange')
sql.outbox_triggerNowByEventId_update: UPDATE message_outbox SET next_retry_time=NULL, updated_at=NOW() WHERE event_id='8f99c54b-1d9b-4062-b4a6-fdd6e2f68196' AND status IN ('NEW','FAIL')
sql.shipTimeout_listDuePending: SELECT id,order_id,deadline_time,status,retry_count,next_retry_time FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE status='PENDING' AND deadline_time<=NOW() AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time<=NOW()) ORDER BY deadline_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT 200
sql.shipTimeout_listForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT id,order_id,status,deadline_time,next_retry_time FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE status='PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.shipTimeout_listForAdmin_byOrderId: SELECT id,order_id,status,deadline_time,next_retry_time FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE order_id=900068 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.shipTimeout_countForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE status='PENDING'
sql.refund_listRunnable: SELECT id,order_id,refund_type,status,retry_count,next_retry_time FROM order_refund_task WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time<=NOW()) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 200
sql.refund_listForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT id,order_id,refund_type,status,next_retry_time FROM order_refund_task WHERE status='SUCCESS' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.refund_listForAdmin_byOrderId: SELECT id,order_id,refund_type,status,next_retry_time FROM order_refund_task WHERE order_id=900056 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.refund_countForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_refund_task WHERE status='SUCCESS'
sql.reminder_markRunningBatch_update: UPDATE order_ship_reminder_task SET status='RUNNING', running_at=NOW(), update_time=NOW() WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND remind_time<=NOW() ORDER BY remind_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT 200
sql.reminder_listStaleRunning: SELECT id,order_id,status,running_at,remind_time,retry_count FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE status='RUNNING' AND running_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) ORDER BY running_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 200
sql.reminder_listForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT id,order_id,status,running_at,remind_time FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE status='PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.reminder_countForAdmin_byStatus: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE status='PENDING'
sql.adminOrders_list_byCreateTime: SELECT o.id,o.order_no,o.status,o.create_time,o.pay_time FROM orders o WHERE o.status='paid' ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.adminOrders_list_byPayTime: SELECT o.id,o.order_no,o.status,o.create_time,o.pay_time FROM orders o WHERE o.status='paid' ORDER BY o.pay_time DESC LIMIT 0,100
sql.order_selectByOrderNo: SELECT id,order_no,status,pay_time,create_time FROM orders WHERE order_no='2026030417571315383' LIMIT 1
sql.order_updateForPayByOrderNo: UPDATE orders SET status='paid', pay_time=NOW(), update_time=NOW() WHERE order_no='2026030417571315383' AND status='pending'
